## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, quality assurance, and next steps for FOSSA's technical blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on 5 most popular CWEs + additional ideas (e.g., CWE vs CVE) instead of all 25](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Implement a code review process for technical accuracy before publication](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Shift focus to AI-driven PSEO experiments after completing the initial CWE cluster](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Aim to publish remaining CWE cluster articles by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Assurance

  - [Current low bar for publication, working towards traffic-triggered manual reviews](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Exploring options for editorial oversight, especially for technical content](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Considering adding a fact-checking step in the AROP workflow](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Main AI content issues: hallucinated statistics, made-up quotes, product misinformation](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Addressing product hallucinations by enriching polishing instructions with jobs-to-be-done analysis](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Technical Accuracy Concerns

  - [Primary focus on ensuring accuracy of technical details, code snippets, and error representations](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Exploring options for code review:](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
    1.  Human review by an engineering-background team member (15-20 minutes per article)
    2.  Tech-enabled abstract process
  - [Decision on review process to be made by Tuesday next week](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

### Content Strategy and Volume

  - [Shifting from 25 CWEs to 4-5 most popular + additional ideas (e.g., CWE vs CVE)](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Aiming for 10 editorial-style articles per week due to higher effort required](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Considering programmatic content ideas after initial cluster completion](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Publication Process

  - [FOSSA currently uses pull requests and markdown files instead of a CMS](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [GrowthX to export markdown files for FOSSA to integrate into their system](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### Future Content Direction

  - [Exploring AI-driven PSEO experiments after completing the CWE cluster](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose PSEO options for discussion in next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)

### Registry Migration Update

  - [FOSSA working on stabilizing the existing website](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Changes to scripts expected in the coming week](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete and deliver remaining articles in the CWE cluster](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Decide on code review process (manual or automated) by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose PSEO experiment ideas for Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Aim to publish remaining CWE cluster articles by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [FOSSA to update on registry migration progress in the next call](https://fathom.video/share/z5M3QYfhxEP4s1KYVp4wbLsHpWfdLAmi?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
